Package at.jku.se.resource

  • Klassen
    Klasse
    Beschreibung
    ActivityLogResource
    REST resource for reading activity logs and CSV export (FR-08, FR-16).
    ConflictResource
    REST resource for scheduling conflict detection (FR-15).
    DeviceResource
    REST resource for device management (FR-04, FR-05, FR-06, FR-07).
    EnergyResource
    REST resource for energy consumption tracking and the dashboard (FR-14, FR-16).
    IoTResource
    REST endpoint exposing IoT integration status (FR-18).
    NotificationResource
    REST resource for in-app notifications (FR-12).
    RoomResource
    REST resource for room management (FR-03).
    RuleResource
    REST resource for IF-THEN automation rules (FR-10, FR-11).
    SceneResource
    REST resource for scene management and activation (FR-17).
    ScheduleResource
    REST resource for time-based schedules (FR-09).
    UserResource
    REST resource for user management.
    VacationModeResource
    REST resource for vacation mode (FR-21).
